headline: Dell (NYSE:DELL) Unveils Eye Health Research And New AI Systems
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) released peer reviewed research on sleep and eye health outcomes for users of Dell XPS laptops with Eyesafe Display and Eyesafe IQ. The study reported measurable improvements in sleep quality, eye comfort, and productivity among evening users, with Eyesafe IQ delivering the strongest effects. In parallel, Dell introduced new AI infrastructure products, including the PowerEdge XE8812 server built around advanced NVIDIA technology for intensive workloads. Dell...

headline: 1 Services Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Brush Off
summary: Business services providers use their specialized expertise to help enterprises streamline operations and cut costs. Furthermore, the demand for their offerings is rising as more clients outsource non-core functions, a trend that has enabled the industry to return 18.4% over the past six months. At the same time, the S&P 500 was up 9.3%.
